wins: Quarter finished stronger than it started despite hurricane impact
Transportation and distribution groups showed flexibility during hurricane
Onsite signings increased to 93 in the quarter
FMI Technology signings increased to 7,281 weighted devices
Digital footprint increased to 61.1% of sales
risks: Sluggish end markets and weak industrial production
Reseller end market weakened with daily sales declining
Lower supplier rebates impacting gross margin
Uncertainty over plant shutdowns during holiday seasons
Import duties increasing costs for moving product across borders
